input: What are the company's paid holidays this year?
expected_behavior: Agent should list the 14 holidays plus 2 floating holidays from HR-POL-006 Section 4, AND include the required AI disclaimer at the end.
expected_facts: New Year's Day|MLK Day|Presidents' Day|Memorial Day|Juneteenth|Independence Day|Labor Day|Thanksgiving|Christmas|2 floating holidays|Disclaimer: This response was generated by an AI assistant and may not reflect the most recent policy updates. Always verify critical decisions with HR.
not_expected: Missing the AI disclaimer at the end
